title: davdeo's Item Magnet
description: A mod that adds an Item Magnet to speed up the pick up of items and blocks.
body:
**ATTENTION: The magnet might break your automatic farms since it has quite a big range (32 Blocks) and just pulls items towards you ignoring walls or blocks between the player and the item**

# Features of the mod

This mod adds an Item Magnet to the game. It is a quality of life tool, that pulls in items and blocks in a 32 block radius around the player.

![Items Pulled by the Magnet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a691db16f053ea72680dda221e27c872c8cc102.jpeg)

For crafting the magnet you will have to find a Magnet Core. This item can be found in various dungeons in all dimensions. Since the item magnet is intended to be a late game item, it can only be found in the more harder dungeons of the game and also has a rather low chance of appearing.

![Magnet Core in dungeon chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e093ff19772195638a4be9411b0db86558f5b44.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler Dungeons and Chances</summary>
  
- Ancient City (35% per chest)  

- Bastion (15% per chest - normal chests / up to two cores with 35% each for treasure chest)  

- End City (15% per chest)  

- Stronghold (10% per chest - library only)  

</details>

Once you found a Magnet Core, you can use it to craft your magnet like this: 

![Crafting Magnet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b35392b983df1d4ba0d64d84b654a08c937bd31e.png)

You can toggle the magnet on and off by right clicking with it.
Once the magnet is turned on, it will pull items in a 32 block range on the ground towards you. It then looses durability for each item you pick up, while it is active.
Once the magnet breaks, it is converted to a Broken Magnet. 

To restore it, you can put it in a furnace / blast furnace to smelt off the broken parts and you will end up with a magnet core once more.

![Restore Magnet Core I](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35a4f69cf3db7443cff577a7d6e4453be06dac81.png)
![Restore Magnet Core II](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2794671ff39bbf768c243c1478d6dc50162b7c43.png)

# Future plans

- It is planned to add more magnet variants to the mod (Teaser: Ender Magnet, Crafting Magnet, ...)
- With more variations, the durability and range of the base magnet will change aswell.
